neighbors.name: Michael E. Klein & Peggy Klein
neighbors.claims: Michael E. and Peggy Klein own property in the Kansas Settlement farming area of Cochise County ([coyotegulch.blog](https://coyotegulch.blog/2022/11/07/the-cochise-county-groundwater-wars-a-thirsty-megafarm-is-driving-a-libertarian-enclave-in-arizona-to-embrace-a-radical-solution-government-regulation-grist/#:~:text=with%20a%20small%20farmhouse%20in,In%20most%20of%20the)). They are not listed as participants in local government or public comment forums on development issues ([citizenportal.ai](https://citizenportal.ai/articles/7254792/Cochise-County/Arizona/Cochise-supervisors-approve-multiple-rezones-health-contracts-and-taxdeed-sales#:~:text=supervisors%20approve%20multiple%20rezones%2C%20health,created%20by%20AI%20summarizing%20key)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Have a trusted local farming figure introduce the project, stressing respect for agricultural land and maintaining the area’s quiet rural character.

neighbors.name: Zane Daniel Ritenour & Carina Marie Ritenour
neighbors.claims: Zane and Carina Ritenour are listed as landowners on a parcel in rural Cochise County near the Kansas Settlement zone ([coyotegulch.blog](https://coyotegulch.blog/2022/11/07/the-cochise-county-groundwater-wars-a-thirsty-megafarm-is-driving-a-libertarian-enclave-in-arizona-to-embrace-a-radical-solution-government-regulation-grist/#:~:text=with%20a%20small%20farmhouse%20in,In%20most%20of%20the)). No public records or news reports show them taking any stance or active role regarding local development proposals ([citizenportal.ai](https://citizenportal.ai/articles/7254792/Cochise-County/Arizona/Cochise-supervisors-approve-multiple-rezones-health-contracts-and-taxdeed-sales#:~:text=supervisors%20approve%20multiple%20rezones%2C%20health,created%20by%20AI%20summarizing%20key)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage the Ritenours through a neighborly one-on-one conversation highlighting how the project can coexist with farming and protect property values long-term.

neighbors.name: Jason L. Shepherd & Meshell D. Shepherd
neighbors.claims: Jason and Meshell Shepherd own a piece of property in the Willcox area’s agricultural community ([coyotegulch.blog](https://coyotegulch.blog/2022/11/07/the-cochise-county-groundwater-wars-a-thirsty-megafarm-is-driving-a-libertarian-enclave-in-arizona-to-embrace-a-radical-solution-government-regulation-grist/#:~:text=with%20a%20small%20farmhouse%20in,In%20most%20of%20the)). They have no evident public profile in local planning meetings or media concerning development or energy projects ([citizenportal.ai](https://citizenportal.ai/articles/7254792/Cochise-County/Arizona/Cochise-supervisors-approve-multiple-rezones-health-contracts-and-taxdeed-sales#:~:text=supervisors%20approve%20multiple%20rezones%2C%20health,created%20by%20AI%20summarizing%20key)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Approach the Shepherds in person with information on visual screening and noise controls, emphasizing that the project will respect their privacy and the rural views.

neighbors.name: Gale Nellans
neighbors.claims: Gale Nellans is the recorded owner of a parcel in the Willcox Basin area of southeast Cochise County ([coyotegulch.blog](https://coyotegulch.blog/2022/11/07/the-cochise-county-groundwater-wars-a-thirsty-megafarm-is-driving-a-libertarian-enclave-in-arizona-to-embrace-a-radical-solution-government-regulation-grist/#:~:text=Myers%20just%20kept%20rising%2C%20so,coastal%20paradise%20that%20Duckels%20was)). There is no public indication of Nellans taking a position on development, and no mention of this owner in local civic records was found ([citizenportal.ai](https://citizenportal.ai/articles/7254792/Cochise-County/Arizona/Cochise-supervisors-approve-multiple-rezones-health-contracts-and-taxdeed-sales#:~:text=supervisors%20approve%20multiple%20rezones%2C%20health,created%20by%20AI%20summarizing%20key)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Reach out via a familiar community member to discuss how the project will be decommissioned and land restored, reassuring Nellans that property values and land use can be preserved.

overview_summary: All four profiled neighbors are private landowners with no public record of advocating for or against development, so their stances remain unclear. None hold elected office or high-profile community roles. Influence is generally low among these neighbors, with no outspoken supporters or opponents identified.
